content:
RORK вЂ” FINAL EXECUTION BLOCK: COMPLETE IVX END TO END NOW

STOP ALL OTHER TASKS.

Do not return another plan.
Do not return another partial report.
Do not ask me whether to continue.
Do not mark anything complete without proof.

CURRENT VERIFIED STATE

The project is not complete because:

- GitHub SHA does not match backend SHA.
- APK SHA/build marker does not match GitHub or backend.
- Latest local changes were not pushed.
- Real-device QA was not completed.
- Projects and deals progressive loading are incomplete.
- Realtime for projects and deals is incomplete.
- Image/media optimization is incomplete.
- Navigation optimization is incomplete.
- Admin CRUD is incomplete.
- Full QA matrix is incomplete.
- Vercel-related backend dependency/reference still exists.
- Build and production verification are not aligned.

MISSION

Complete all remaining work, push the final code to the owner-controlled GitHub repository, deploy matching backend/frontend code, build a matching Android APK, and return verified evidence.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 1 вЂ” VERIFY ACTIVE SOURCE OF TRUTH
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Return first:

- active GitHub repository
- active branch
- current local HEAD
- current GitHub remote HEAD
- current Render deployed SHA
- current APK build SHA
- current Expo app version
- current versionCode
- current backend version
- current production API URL

Do not continue using multiple divergent code states.

Choose one final source of truth:

GitHub main branch HEAD

All other builds and deployments must be rebuilt from that exact SHA.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 2 вЂ” VERIFY GITHUB ACCESS
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Credentials are already stored in protected variables.

Do not ask for a new token until runtime proves failure.

Verify:

- token variable exists
- token is loaded
- correct token variable name
- correct GitHub account
- correct repository permission
- authenticated GitHub API response

Return only:

- variable name
- PRESENT or MISSING
- GitHub API status
- exact sanitized error

Only if the API returns 401, 403, expired, revoked, deleted, or missing may you report a credential blocker.

If access works:

1. Push all pending commits.
2. Verify remote HEAD.
3. Return the final commit SHA and commit URL.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 3 вЂ” COMPLETE REMAINING CODE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Complete these unfinished items now:

1. Projects progressive loading
2. Deals progressive loading
3. Cursor pagination
4. Cached first page
5. Background refresh
6. Realtime delta updates
7. Project image optimization
8. Deal image optimization
9. Video/media thumbnail loading
10. Navigation performance
11. Duplicate route cleanup
12. Stable list keys
13. Prevent repeated screen mounts
14. Full Admin CRUD
15. Publish/unpublish
16. Archive/delete
17. Role protection
18. Error recovery per module
19. Empty/loading/offline states
20. Retry per module

Apply to:

- projects
- deals
- members
- investors
- reels
- properties
- portfolio
- transactions
- CRM
- notifications
- admin modules

Do not load entire datasets at once.

Use progressive page sizes:

- reels: 5вЂ“10
- projects: 10
- deals: 10
- members: 20
- transactions: 20
- notifications: 20

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 4 вЂ” FIX VERCEL DEPENDENCIES
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Audit every remaining Vercel reference.

Classify each as:

- active hosting dependency
- active AI gateway dependency
- transitive SDK string
- dead code
- obsolete environment variable
- harmless compiled constant

Remove all obsolete runtime dependencies.

If the backend still uses:

ai-gateway.vercel.sh

then either:

A. replace it with the approved IVX AI provider/backend route, or

B. document clearly that it is intentionally retained as an AI service dependency and not as hosting.

The production APK must have:

- zero Vercel hosting calls
- zero preview Vercel calls
- zero localhost calls
- zero tunnel calls
- zero obsolete environment variables

Return a final network-host inventory.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 5 вЂ” ALIGN MOBILE AND BACKEND
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

After final code is pushed:

1. Deploy backend from the exact final GitHub SHA.
2. Build Android APK from the exact same final GitHub SHA.
3. Embed the final SHA in:
   - app diagnostics
   - /health response
   - build metadata
4. Confirm all three match:
   - GitHub SHA
   - backend SHA
   - APK SHA marker

Do not use labels such as:

build-22-module-completion

The app must expose the real 40-character commit SHA.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 6 вЂ” BUILD
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Run:

- clean dependency install
- TypeScript
- lint
- Expo Doctor
- Expo Router validation
- Android bundle validation
- clean Gradle build
- signed release APK build

If the build fails:

Return:

- exact command
- exact first failing error
- file
- line
- dependency
- correction

Do not return only вЂњtimeout.вЂќ

Retry with a valid build environment and enough execution time.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 7 вЂ” BACKEND DEPLOYMENT
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Deploy the final backend from the matching GitHub SHA.

Verify:

- deploy status = live
- /health returns 200
- /health includes final commit SHA
- Supabase connection works
- auth route works
- members route works
- projects route works
- deals route works
- reels route works
- upload route works
- admin route authorization works

Return:

- Render service
- deployment ID
- deployed SHA
- deployment time
- health response
- route test table

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 8 вЂ” REAL DEVICE QA
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Use a physical Android device or a connected Android device environment.

Perform:

1. Uninstall old IVX app.
2. Clear storage.
3. Install final APK.
4. Cold launch.
5. Confirm no black screen.
6. Confirm no Maximum Update Depth error.
7. Confirm Owner Login displays.
8. Log in manually.
9. Confirm Home opens.
10. Confirm Admin opens.
11. Confirm internal metrics are only in Admin.
12. Confirm Reels load.
13. Confirm one reel plays at a time.
14. Confirm next reels paginate.
15. Confirm video upload completes.
16. Confirm upload status progresses.
17. Confirm Members paginate.
18. Confirm Projects paginate.
19. Confirm Deals paginate.
20. Confirm realtime updates.
21. Confirm images load progressively.
22. Confirm logout.
23. Confirm back button cannot reopen Admin.
24. Disable network.
25. Confirm safe offline screen.
26. Restore network.
27. Confirm retry recovery.
28. Force-stop and reopen.
29. Repeat launch 10 times.
30. Record the complete test.

Required result:

- 10/10 successful launches
- 0 black screens
- 0 render loops
- 0 infinite loaders
- 0 unauthorized owner routes
- 0 automatic owner sign-ins

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 9 вЂ” COMPLETE QA MATRIX
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Run and return a table for at least these tests:

AUTH
1. Owner login
2. Wrong password
3. Non-owner denied
4. Logout
5. Back protection
6. Cold launch
7. No automatic sign-in

HOME
8. Home opens
9. No internal metrics shown
10. Live data renders

ADMIN
11. Business Overview opens
12. Metrics match production
13. Admin role enforced
14. CRUD create
15. CRUD edit
16. CRUD archive
17. CRUD delete
18. Publish/unpublish

REELS
19. First page loads
20. Pagination works
21. Autoplay visible item
22. Previous item pauses
23. Upload works
24. Processing status works
25. Failed upload retry
26. Like works
27. Comment works
28. Save works
29. Share works

MEMBERS
30. First page loads
31. Pagination works
32. No duplicates
33. Search works
34. Avatar loading works
35. Live update works

PROJECTS
36. First page loads
37. Pagination works
38. Detail opens
39. Create works
40. Edit works
41. Publish works
42. Realtime update works

DEALS
43. First page loads
44. Pagination works
45. Detail opens
46. Create works
47. Edit works
48. Publish works
49. Realtime update works

SYSTEM
50. Offline mode
51. Retry recovery
52. No Maximum Update Depth
53. No black screen
54. API health 200
55. GitHub/backend/APK SHA match

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PHASE 10 вЂ” REQUIRED FINAL EVIDENCE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Return exactly:

1. active repository
2. branch
3. final GitHub SHA
4. GitHub commit URL
5. files changed
6. files removed
7. Vercel dependencies removed
8. remaining intentional Vercel references
9. TypeScript result
10. lint result
11. Expo Doctor result
12. Android build result
13. APK filename
14. APK download link
15. APK SHA-256
16. APK embedded commit SHA
17. Render deployment ID
18. Render deployed SHA
19. /health response
20. route verification table
21. QA matrix
22. real-device logcat
23. real-device screen recording
24. screenshots of:
    - Owner Login
    - Home
    - Admin Business Overview
    - Reels
    - Members
    - Projects
    - Deals
    - Video upload
25. final confirmation that all SHAs match

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
DO NOT ASK FOR CREDENTIALS BY DEFAULT
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Assume credentials exist.

Verify binding first.

Only ask for intervention after verified:

- missing variable
- 401
- 403
- expired
- revoked
- deleted

Return the exact sanitized response.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
FINAL DEFINITION OF DONE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

The task is complete only when:

- all remaining code is implemented
- GitHub push succeeds
- backend deploy succeeds
- APK build succeeds
- GitHub SHA = backend SHA = APK SHA
- real-device QA passes
- Reels works
- video upload works
- Members pagination works
- Projects pagination works
- Deals pagination works
- Admin CRUD works
- Vercel obsolete dependencies are removed
- no automatic owner sign-in
- no Maximum Update Depth error
- no black screen
- no infinite loading
- complete proof is attached

Do not respond with another plan.

Execute everything possible now.

If one blocker remains, return only:

- blocker
- exact error
- service
- file
- line
- attempted fix
- evidence
- required resolution
